attributes.title: [ActiveMQ OTel] Overview
attributes.description: At-a-glance broker health. Quick answer to "am I healthy?"

params.markdown:
## [ActiveMQ OTel] Overview

At-a-glance landing page for broker health:
- Active connections and broker memory/store utilization
- Total messages in broker
- Enqueue vs dequeue rate over time
- Top destinations by message count (excluding Advisory)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.broker.connection.current IS NOT NULL OR activemq.connection.count IS NOT NULL
| EVAL conn = COALESCE(activemq.broker.connection.current, activemq.connection.count)
| STATS connections = MAX(conn)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.broker.connection.current IS NOT NULL OR activemq.connection.count IS NOT NULL
| EVAL conn = COALESCE(activemq.broker.connection.current, activemq.connection.count)
| STATS connections = MAX(conn)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_pct = AVG(activemq.memory.utilization) * 100

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_pct = AVG(activemq.memory.utilization) * 100

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.store.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS store_pct = AVG(activemq.store.utilization) * 100

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.store.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS store_pct = AVG(activemq.store.utilization) * 100

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.broker.message.current IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_msgs = MAX(activemq.broker.message.current)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.broker.message.current IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_msgs = MAX(activemq.broker.message.current)

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.broker.enqueue.count IS NOT NULL OR activemq.broker.dequeue.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS enqueue_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.broker.enqueue.count)), dequeue_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.broker.dequeue.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.broker.enqueue.count IS NOT NULL OR activemq.broker.dequeue.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS enqueue_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.broker.enqueue.count)), dequeue_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.broker.dequeue.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL OR activemq.store.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_pct = AVG(activemq.memory.utilization) * 100, store_pct = AVG(activemq.store.utilization) * 100 BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL OR activemq.store.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_pct = AVG(activemq.memory.utilization) * 100, store_pct = AVG(activemq.store.utilization) * 100 BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS message_count = MAX(activemq.message.current) BY dest
| SORT message_count DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS message_count = MAX(activemq.message.current) BY dest
| SORT message_count DESC
| LIMIT 20
